features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules (src/backup, src/upload)

layers.name: structural
layers.command: test -f src/backup/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/upload/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL
layers.fail_message: One or more CLAUDE.md files missing

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: grep -q 'diff.rs' src/backup/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'diff_from_remote' src/upload/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Parent Context' src/backup/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Parent Context' src/upload/CLAUDE.md && echo VALID || echo INVALID
layers.fail_message: CLAUDE.md files missing required sections or new pattern documentation

alternative_verification.command: test -f src/backup/CLAUDE.md && test -f src/upload/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL
